site.name: Gas Town Hall
site.description: Gas Town Hall is the official documentation and community hub for Gas Town, an open source orchestration layer for AI coding agents. Track accountability, measure quality, and scale your AI-assisted engineering workflows.

blogPosts.title: Gas Town: from Clown Show to v1.0
blogPosts.description: Gas Town and Beads have both released version 1.0.0, marking the end of Gas Town's chaotic early phase and the start of stable, production-ready use.

blogPosts.title: Vibe Maintainer
blogPosts.description: Steve argues that maintainers of successful OSS projects will increasingly need AI-heavy workflows to manage waves of AI-generated pull requests without losing quality or velocity.

blogPosts.title: Welcome to the Wasteland: A Thousand Gas Towns
blogPosts.description: The Wasteland is a way to link thousands of Gas Towns together in a trust network, to build stuff really, really fast.

blogPosts.title: Gas Town Refinery #1
blogPosts.description: Chris Sells talks to Steve Yegge about the origin of, and future for, the Beads, Gas Town and Gas City projects, plus an extended demo.

blogPosts.title: The AI Vampire
blogPosts.description: AI is starting to kill us all, Colin Robinson style. Being in the same room with AI is draining people.

blogPosts.title: The Anthropic Hive Mind
blogPosts.description: Something is happening over at Anthropic. They are a spaceship that is beginning to take off.

blogPosts.title: Software Survival 3.0
blogPosts.description: I spent a lot of time writing software with AI last year, and I had some pretty good successes, notably Beads and Gas Town...
